column1: # Two-slot OTA layout for 4MB flash. App partitions must be 64KB-aligned;
# otadata ends at 0x11000 so ota_0 starts at the next aligned offset 0x20000.
# Each app slot is 1920K — large enough for WiFi + BLE + esp32-camera +
# libpeer; the Arduino-side bin lands around 1.4MB so headroom is real.
